title: 대용량 TXT 파일을 지연 없이 읽는 방법

checks.name: metadata_complete
checks.note: Pre-publication frontmatter contains the fields needed for review and scheduling.

checks.name: required_sections
checks.note: Article includes the required problem-first and publication sections.

checks.name: structured_answer
checks.note: Article includes steps and a comparison table.

checks.name: external_reference
checks.note: Article cites an official or recognized external reference.

checks.name: product_after_education
checks.note: Product appears after the educational explanation, or the article explicitly has no related application.

checks.name: publish_ready_image
checks.note: At least one referenced blog image asset exists.

checks.name: image_quality
checks.note: Referenced image assets use language-specific paths, accessible SVG structure, word wrapping, and non-overlapping arrows.

checks.name: internal_links
checks.note: Internal link metadata exists; full credit requires at least one related article.

checks.name: readability_depth
checks.note: Article length supports a complete but focused answer.

checks.name: translation_quality
checks.note: Translation counterpart, section alignment, slug alignment, and localized terminology are valid.
